name: Acme AI Series A Diligence
question: Should Acme AI raise a Series A now or wait 6 months?

sources.summary: Targeting $12M pre-money, 3 warm intros to Tier 1 funds
Competitor Series A closed at $15M, 2 more in pipeline
AI infra deal count down 18% QoQ but median round size up 22%
1,847 commits in 90 days, 94% test pass rate, 3 new integrations shipped
3 warm intros: Fund A (AI-focused $200M AUM), Fund B (seed-to-A $80M), Angel C (ex-CTO BigCo)

goldenMemo.recommendation: Raise now, conditional on activating trust-node intros this week

interventions.title: Ship benchmark artifact before partner meetings
Prepare 6-month scenario memo as negotiation tool

counterModel.thesis: Market cooldown makes timing moot — wait for stronger metrics
counterModel.whatWouldValidate: Two or more target funds pass on current pipeline

traceability.description: Every claim links to a source

variableCompleteness.description: All 6 categories represented, weights sum to 1.0

counterModelQuality.description: Counter-model is serious and specific, not strawman

interventionUsefulness.description: Interventions are actionable, time-bound, and measurable

recommendationClarity.description: Recommendation is specific, conditional, and includes falsification criteria
